payload.answer: Extracted 4 atomic memory cards capturing the text’s core durable-evidence, traceability, semantic-recall, and application-database lifecycle/conflict ownership requirements.

entity_resolution.reason: No explicit entity identifiers were provided in the input text; only generic concepts were referenced.

payload.intent: Extract atomic, durable-memory-ready cards from the provided article text for Brain’s personal memory system.

memory_cards.statement: AI memory systems need durable source evidence.
Atomic memory cards should be small and traceable.
A semantic index can improve recall in the memory system.
The application database must own lifecycle and conflict state (not the semantic layer).

details: Created 4 small, traceable atomic cards from the provided fixture text.
Did not introduce any facts beyond what was stated.

repair_options: If available, add source citations or direct quotes from the underlying article/work to strengthen durability/traceability claims.
If additional context defines 'semantic index' or 'conflict state' semantics, add those definitions as separate atomic cards.
